title: ✅ Why This Works:
content:
✅ Why This Works:
✔ Adds a redemptive, noble role into the system.
✔ Forces tactical decision-making—the Purifier must carefully choose when to act.
✔ Introduces thematic connections to literature’s healers, exorcists, and divine intervention figures.

📜 2. Mid-Semester Shake-Up – The “Chaos Event”

📜 At the midpoint of the semester, an event disrupts the power balance, creating an opportunity for the lower-ranked players.

✔ Triggered in Week 6 or 7 (students know it’s coming, but the details are unknown).
✔ Players in the bottom five XP ranks are given an opportunity to challenge the top XP holders.
✔ The event forces faction-based strategy—alliances must react accordingly.

📜 Chaos Event Mechanics
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 340 (chunk 340/555)
